# Artifact Debt High Fixture

This fixture is engineered to push the §19 Artifact Debt Score well above
zero: unlabelled code fences, a parse-error diagram, no nearby prose for
several artifacts, and a small raw HTML block.

```
no_language_tag()
```

<div>raw html block</div>

```
another_unlabelled()
```
